headline: Is Workday (WDAY) Now A Potential Opportunity After Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Workday's current share price reflects fair value or an opportunity, it helps to break the story into clear valuation pieces rather than relying on headlines alone. The stock last closed at US$112.50, with returns of a 14.9% decline over 7 days, a 15.5% decline over 30 days and a 45.3% decline year to date, adding to a 50.3% decline over the past year and a 56.1% decline over five years. These moves sit alongside a stream of ongoing product updates and customer...

headline: Workday OnePay Tie Up Links Financial Wellness To Valuation Story
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) has partnered with OnePay to integrate financial wellness tools into Workday Wellness. The collaboration introduces AI driven benefit recommendations and access to OnePay's financial services for employees. The move expands Workday's presence in workplace financial technology and broadens its employee benefits offering. Workday, trading at $112.5, has experienced a 50.3% decline over the past year and a 45.3% decline year to date, pointing to a period of weak recent...
